input.headline: Group words that share a common thread.

raw.headline: Group words that share a common thread.

winner: Why did the words refuse to participate in the group activity? Because they insisted on going their own way, even though they shared a common thread!

candidates.text: Why did the words refuse to participate in the group activity? Because they insisted on going their own way, even though they shared a common thread!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "Puns on 'common thread' and 'going their own way' are clever and specific, with a good surprise factor."}

candidates.text: Why did the dictionary go to jail? Because it kept stealing all the other words' prefixes and suffixes.
